article_meta.title: — News —'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S

reasoning: The model avoided quoting-attribution violations and flagged two genuine author-level bias instances (structural slant and loaded word choice). However, it missed several clear biased phrases in the author's prose, notably the characterization of Trump’s “aggressive approach” and the loaded framing “rocked by demonstrations over its collapsing economy.” Labels applied were appropriate.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items derive from the author’s framing/structure or word choice; no quoted or clearly attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Both flagged instances are defensible: the headline/lead emphasis supports a Slant finding and “regime” is a loaded term (Word Choice).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-level bias: “has continued to take an aggressive approach to Iran” (subjective characterization) and “rocked by demonstrations over its collapsing economy” (loaded/subjective phrasing).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: The chosen labels (Slant and Word Choice) match the identified issues and are standard for these patterns.
